nodes.label: Codec Preference (Guide)
nodes.rationale: Order equals preference; offers/answers include only the listed codecs plus DTMF telephone-event; no match falls back to the SDK default set (G722, PCMA, PCMU). Example use: G.711 u-law passthrough towards a realtime AI API.

nodes.label: Per-Call Media Tap (Guide)
nodes.rationale: CreateReceiver/CreateSender give raw frame access to any call — foundation for voice bots, AI bridging and custom streaming. FrameReceived fires synchronously on the media path; buffer into e.g. a Channel<T> and return immediately.

nodes.label: Recording & Playback (WAV/MP3)
nodes.rationale: WAV end-to-end; MP3 via ffmpeg-backed infrastructure adapter; MP3-negotiated calls use passthrough without re-encoding. Optional encryption via RecordingOptions.EncryptionProvider (e.g. AesGcmRecordingEncryptionProvider). Built-in payload transcoding covers L16/PCMU/PCMA/G.722. Conference variants require an IMixedMediaBus — since 2.0.0 the core ships no conferencing; the mix bus comes from own wiring or the future commercial conferencing plugin.

edges.source_location: mix bus from the commercial conferencing plugin
